name: hyper-sills-mcp
description: 120-skill AI vault exposed over MCP via Graph-of-Skills architecture. Exposes search, semantic search, skill loading, dependency graphs, task recommendations, and category browsing. Powers all agents in the Hyperfocus Zone ecosystem with shared skill intelligence.
author: welshDog

tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Search the 120-skill vault by keyword, category (agents/dev/hypercode/broski/web3/youtube), or tag. Returns matching skills with ID, hero name, description, and file path.

query.description: Keyword matched against skill ID, hero name, description, and tags

category.description: Filter to one of: agents, dev, hypercode, broski, web3, youtube

tag.description: Filter by a specific tag e.g. coding, orchestration, ND-friendly

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Find skills by describing the problem in natural language. Uses semantic similarity — no need to know skill IDs. Falls back to keyword search gracefully.

query.description: Natural-language description e.g. auto-restart a crashed agent

tools.name: load_skill
tools.description: Load the full markdown content + Graph-of-Skills metadata (depends_on, provides, related, graph_notes) for a skill by ID e.g. HS-042 or DS-028.

skill_id.description: The skill ID e.g. HS-042, DS-009, HS-001

tools.name: get_skill_graph
tools.description: Return the full Graph-of-Skills dependency graph for a skill — prerequisites (depends_on), capabilities it unlocks (provides), and related skills. Hero names auto-resolved.

skill_id.description: The skill ID e.g. HS-008, HS-042

tools.name: recommend_for_task
tools.description: Describe a task in plain language, get back the top ranked skills with relevance scores and load_skill() next-step hints.

task.description: Natural-language task e.g. build a self-healing agent

tools.name: list_skills_by_category
tools.description: List all skills in a category (agents/dev/hypercode/broski/web3/youtube), or get a full overview with category counts and pack sizes if no category given.

category.description: agents, dev, hypercode, broski, web3, or youtube — leave blank for overview
